posts.author: AyyLmaonnaise
posts.body: Predictions: 5 of 5 Pending | Tied for 1st with 20 others Bagratunyan vs. ChernyshevEduard Bagratunyan, TKO, R1This guy has a crazy record but it’s hard to take him seriously because he’s massively padding his record and not even finishing the few “solid” guys he fights
